[i18nprune] [warn] 3 translation call(s) use a non-literal key — missing only adds paths for literal keys seen in the scan; use `validate` or `locales dynamic` for dynamic call sites.
[i18nprune] [warn] issue: i18nprune.scan.dynamic_key_sites · https://docs.i18nprune.dev/issues/scan#dynamic-key-sites
